message:
fix(crates): inventory rollback resilience, reconnect off-by-one, and history testability

fcp-host/fcp-host.rs — inventory apply/rollback resilience:
- connector_inventory_apply_handler: replace .ok_or_else()? chains for
  post-apply registry lookup and admin-state reconciliation with explicit
  match blocks that call rollback_connector_inventory before returning the
  error. Previously, a missing registry entry or reconciliation failure
  after a successful apply would leave the system in an inconsistent state
  (file written, registry mutated, but admin state stale).
- apply_connector_config_payload: same pattern — rollback on registry-miss
  and reconciliation failure. Additionally, move admin_state reconciliation
  before the append_config_revision call so the revision is only recorded
  if reconciliation succeeds.
- rollback_connector_inventory: now also reconciles admin state after
  rolling back the registry, reporting the outcome as a third note in the
  rollback summary string (file_note; registry_note; lifecycle_note).

fcp-streaming/health.rs — reconnect attempts off-by-one:
- Change record_disconnect() threshold from `>` to `>=` for
  max_reconnect_attempts. With max=3, the old code allowed 4 disconnects
  before marking unhealthy (1,2,3 = Reconnecting, 4 = Unhealthy). Now
  correctly marks unhealthy on the 3rd disconnect (1,2 = Reconnecting,
  3 = Unhealthy).
- Add zero_max_reconnect_attempts_fails_first_disconnect test.
- Update existing escalation_to_unhealthy and exhaustion scenario tests
  to match the corrected boundary.

fwc/history.rs — env-injectable config + env var name fix:
- Extract env_or_with() that takes a closure for environment variable
  lookup, enabling unit tests to inject fake env values without mutating
  the real environment.
- Add _with() variants of max_log_size, max_rotated_files, and
  default_limit that accept the injected getter.
- Fix env var name: "FWC_max_log_size()_BYTES" (broken copy-paste from
  the function name) → "FWC_MAX_LOG_SIZE_BYTES".
- Extract MAX_LOG_SIZE_ENV_VAR, MAX_ROTATED_FILES_ENV_VAR, and
  DEFAULT_LIMIT_ENV_VAR constants.

fwc/main.rs — minor wiring adjustment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
